metadata.name: Draft Letter of Intent (LOI) for Commercial Lease

description: A business client wants to make an initial offer to lease a retail space. The agent needs to draft an LOI.

nodes.task_description: Gather the key terms for the LOI from the client (e.g., lease term, rental rate, tenant improvement allowance).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent documents all essential business terms for the proposed lease.

nodes.task_description: Use a standard LOI template to draft the document with the client's proposed terms.

expected_outcome.expected: A non-binding Letter of Intent is accurately drafted.

nodes.task_description: Send the draft LOI to the client for review and approval before sending to the landlord's agent.

expected_outcome.expected: The draft is sent to the client for final review.
